creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi John,

I've updated the LDFLAGS/CFLAGS to use += so they do not blow away any
user-specified options in make.conf. Is that OK or was it intended to do
that?
Also, do you want a "Sponsored by:   iXsystems" for this?

I've also updated the LIB_DEPENDS to not have specific versions, and
moved the LICENSE, which makes portlint happy.

http://people.freebsd.org/~bdrewery/patch-audio-pianobar.txt

-- 
Regards,
Bryan Drewery
bdrewery@freenode/EFNet
